description_long: This handbag features a structured, boxy silhouette with a metallic, glossy finish in a deep burgundy color. The exterior is adorned with an intricate geometric and floral pattern, giving it a luxurious and ornate appearance. The bag has a single, short, rigid handle attached to the top with metallic hardware, suggesting it is designed to be carried by hand. The closure appears to be a metal frame clasp, adding a vintage touch to the overall design. The surface reflects light, highlighting the detailed pattern and the richness of the material. The handbag is compact, likely suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban setting.
description: A structured, glossy burgundy handbag with a geometric floral pattern and a short, rigid handle. Features metallic hardware and a vintage-style frame clasp.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the continuation of the geometric floral pattern.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full ornate pattern, metallic frame, and the short handle on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the narrow profile and pattern seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same pattern and handle visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small metallic plaque is visible on the upper front center, possibly a brand logo, but no clear brand name or emblem is distinguishable.
attribute_strap_type: Single short, rigid handle attached with metal hardware, not adjustable, designed for hand carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Metal frame clasp closure located at the top center of the bag, providing a secure and vintage-style fastening.
attribute_decorative_elements: The handbag features a metallic geometric and floral pattern as its main decorative element; no additional studs, tassels, or charms are present.
attribute_pattern: Intricate geometric and floral pattern in a metallic finish covering the entire exterior.
